articles.author: Frank  Andrews, Alex  Sundby, Sarah  Lynch Baldwin
articles.title: Live Updates: Seized ship taken toward Iran as Trump and China's Xi agree Strait of Hormuz "must remain open" - CBS News
articles.description: A ship was taken by unknown parties toward Iranian waters after an Indian-flagged vessel was attacked off Oman.
articles.content: In an interview with Fox News' Sean Hannity Thursday from Beijing, President Trump said that during their summit, Chinese President Xi Jinping assured him that China would not provide military equipm… [+1570 chars]
